# CHIBA

CHIBA is a programming language project focused on metal-level functional programming, deterministic compilation, type systems, continuations, memory models, and compiler tooling.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://chiba-lang.org/
- Docs: https://chiba-lang.org/docs/
- Blog: https://chiba-lang.org/blog/
- Type System: https://chiba-lang.org/type_system/
- About: https://chiba-lang.org/about/

## Core Documentation

- ChibaLex: https://chiba-lang.org/docs/chibalex/
- ChibaCC: https://chiba-lang.org/docs/chibacc/
- Memory Model: https://chiba-lang.org/docs/memory-model/
- Package System: https://chiba-lang.org/docs/package-system/

## Source

- GitHub organization: https://github.com/chiba-lang
